case_title: HISHAM NABEEL TAMMAM VS. AVALON OCEAN AVENUE

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAMMAM, HISHAM NABEEL ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR MAR-15-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF TAMMAM, HISHAM NABEEL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-02-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON MAR-15-2023 IN DEPT. 206. HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF HISHAM NABEEL TAMMAM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
